title: 200 Pages Refill Pad A4 Lined Paper Wide Ruled Margin Notes Book
features: 200 pages of high quality A4 lined paper with wide ruling
Refillable pad allows for easy replacement of used pages
Ideal for note-taking, jotting down ideas, and recording thoughts
Features a wide margin for labeling and extra note taking
Durable design with a hardback cover for maximum protection
description: High Quality Lined Paper Refill Pad Book Wide Ruled With Margin 200 Pages 58gsm This A4 Refill Pad contains two hundred 58gsm wide ruled lines paper with margins. Each page is pre-punched and is side bound using glue allowing easy tear-off with a clean edge. Benefits: High quality 58gsm paper Wide ruled with margin for neat writing 200 pages for plenty of note taking Pre-punched for binder Glue binding for easy tear-off
